title: SignalMarkerEnvelope v1
description: Machine-readable schema for the participant-scoped signed wire envelope that publishes a signal marker reference over an established peer session.

message/id.description: Stable identifier of this signed application envelope.

protocol/version.description: Protocol version understood by the sender for this envelope family.

message/kind.description: Canonical message family identifier for this participant-scoped wire envelope.

sender/participant-id.description: Participant identity that signs and emits this message.

created-at.description: Creation timestamp carried inside the signed envelope.

marker/ref.description: Stable reference to the signal-marker artifact or stream record pointed to by this envelope.

policy_annotations.description: Optional local or federation-local annotations outside the minimal semantic core.
